constitutionalism.name: Constitutionalism
constitutionalism.description: The ideology of having a constitution of most basic and protected laws to server as a framework for the nation.

absolutism.name: Absolutism
absolutism.description: Absolute control and power, usually by the monarchy or an ultra nationalist goverment.

unitarianism.name: Unitarianism
unitarianism.description: The government is centralized around one source rather than being divided

federalism.name: Federalism
federalism.description: The government is divided into multiple levels

confederation.name: Confederationalism
confederation.description: The nation is made up of multiple seprate distinct government united together, often without any form of central governance.

authoritarianism.name: Authoritarianism
authoritarianism.description: The government is not controlled by the people but instead controls the subjects.

company_rule.name: Company Rule
company_rule.description: The aristocracy and industry rule the nation.

laissez-faire.name: Laissez-faire
laissez-faire.description: All restrictions on the aristocracy and industry are removed to allow the growth of buissness

social_capitalism.name: Social Capitalism
social_capitalism.description: Capitalism infused with socialist principles, restrictions on the economy to provide the best environment for the people.

socialism.name: Socialism
socialism.description: The distribution of wealth and government control of the economy

anarchism.name: Anarchism
anarchism.description: The absolute minimum of government or complete dissolution of it.

isolationism.name: Isolationism
isolationism.description: Separate the nation from outsiders and worry only about interal policy.

protectionism.name: Protectionism
protectionism.description: The most important priority in foreign lands is protecting your interal processes and nothing else.

conservationist.name: Conservationist
conservationist.description: Focus on conserving the current state of the world.

imperialism.name: Imperialism
imperialism.description: Exploit the world outside your nation to bring as much benefit as posible to yourself.

theocratism.name: Theocratism
theocratism.description: The church is superior to the state

church_integration.name: Church Integration
church_integration.description: The church is integrated into the state but not superior to it

non_interference.name: Non Interference
non_interference.description: The state will not interfere with the operations of the church.

secularism.name: Secularism
secularism.description: The state is rules the church and is superior to it.

social_laws.name: Social Laws
social_laws.description: The laws of the state enforce our cultural traditions and treat woman as dependants of their fathers then husbands needing their consent to do anything.

romanticism.name: Romanticism
romanticism.description: Glorify our culture and history perhaps slightly beyond reality

conservatism.name: Conservatism
conservatism.description: It is best to conserve what already exists in our society and culture and protect it from change

progressivism.name: Progressivism
progressivism.description: We must make progress on our existing culture and society to create a better future

nationalism.name: Nationalism
nationalism.description: Our people are united into one nation built on our culture and identity

charitability.name: Philanthropy
charitability.description: Often private organizations and the church sponsor charitable efforts with minor government support.

welfare.name: Welfare
welfare.description: The government directly pays for and sponsors programs to help the people.

republicanism.name: Republicanism
republicanism.description: The government is formed only of the people and their elected bodies, nothing else

deference.name: Deference
deference.description: The state and the people's power and authority stems from the monarch, therefore they should be respected and their words should be prioritized over overs

hostitlity.name: Hostility
hostitlity.description: Active and public opposition to the monarchy and its power

equality.name: Equality
equality.description: The 'savages' in colonized or unexplored regions are equal but less technologicaly advanced to the people of our nation, therefore they should be left alone.

polygenism.name: Polygenism
polygenism.description: The separate races of human are of separate descent and species than us, therefore they must be left alone.

anti-colonial.name: Anti-Colonial
anti-colonial.description: We should stay out of colonial ventures and other imperialist missions

civilizing_duty.name: Civilizing Duty
civilizing_duty.description: It is our duty as higher peoples to train the savages of the third world how to properly be civilized.

mercantilism.name: Mercantilisim
mercantilism.description: We should take advantage of the savages to extract as much profit as possible for ourselves!

segregation.name: Segregation
segregation.description: Separate minorities from the better civilized people of our nation with as little overlap as possible

lesser_peoples.name: Lesser 'peoples'
lesser_peoples.description: Minorities are more akin to animals rather than people like us.

outsider_citizens.name: Outsider citizens
outsider_citizens.description: Grant minorities citizenship but still exclude them from the rights our people enjoy

limited_rights.name: Limited rights
limited_rights.description: Grant limited rights to the minorities somewhat similiar to the rights of our people.

minority_equality.name: Equality
minority_equality.description: Minorities are part of our people and are equal to them

integration.name: Integration
integration.description: Forcefully integrate the minorities into our population by removing their culture and assimilating them into becoming part of our people.

enforced_patriarchy.name: Enforced Patriarchy
enforced_patriarchy.description: Our nation must have legal social order protecting the dominance men over woman

social_restriction.name: Social Restriction
social_restriction.description: While not legally binding the social order should reflect the dominance of men over woman

voting_rights.name: Voting Rights
voting_rights.description: Woman should have to right to limited voting in elections, perhaps even run for election?

minority_yes.name: Yes
minority_yes.description: This is a party representing minorities.

minority_no.name: No
minority_no.description: This party is not primarily for representing a minorities.

minority_velvon.name: Velvonee
minority_velvon.description: Representative of the velvonee people, very high popularity in velvon, none outside of velvon

minority_histochea.name: Histotschae
minority_histochea.description: Representative of the Histochean people, very high popularity in Histochea, none outside of Histochea

minority_dacia.name: Dakis
minority_dacia.description: Representative of the Dacian people, very high popularity in Dacian regions, none outside of Dacia

minority_fohemia.name: Fohemijanac
minority_fohemia.description: Representative of the Fohemian people, very high popularity in Fohemia, none outside of Fohemia

minority_jhallic.name: Tzalikanoi (Jhallic)
minority_jhallic.description: Representative of the Jhallic people, very high popularity in Jhallica, none outside of Jhallica

minority_all.name: All
minority_all.description: No popularity among non minorities, higher popularity in minority regions but not nearly as much as a party specialized to one minority.

minarchism.name: Minarchism
minarchism.description: The state should be as minimal as possible only existing to protect the people are their rights.

ideo_spread.name: Ideological Spread
ideo_spread.description: We should to the best of our ability fight to spread our ideology.

royalism.name: Royalism
royalism.description: The belief that the authority of the state comes strictly from the authority of the Monarchy.

free_speech.name: Free speech
free_speech.description: The people and the press should have the right to say whatever they wish without restriction.

free_association.name: Free association
free_association.description: The people should have the right to congregate together and assemble it lawful manners.

oligarchy.name: Oligarchy
oligarchy.description: Democracy and power should exist for the rich, powerful, and educated only.

democracy.name: Democracy
democracy.description: The common people of our nation should have the right to democratically elect the government.
